languages.text: "Неубедительно". {n}Ювенна стремительно выхватывает из кобуры игольный пистолет и приставляет его к вашей челюсти снизу.{/n}
"I am not convinced." {n}Juvenna swiftly draws a needle pistol from its holster and presses the barrel under your chin.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Неубедительно". {n}Ювенна стремительно выхватывает из кобуры игольный пистолет и приставляет его к вашей челюсти снизу.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "I am not convinced." {n}Juvenna swiftly draws a needle pistol from its holster and presses the barrel under your chin.{/n}
"I am not convinced." {n}Juvenna swiftly draws a needle pistol from its holster and presses the barrel under your chin.{/n}
"I am not convinced." {n}Juvenna swiftly draws a needle pistol from its holster and presses the barrel under your chin.{/n}

languages.text: «No me convence». {n}Juvenna desenfunda ágilmente una pistola de agujas y coloca el cañón bajo tu barbilla.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I am not convinced." {n}Juvenna swiftly draws a needle pistol from its holster and presses the barrel under your chin.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «No me convence». {n}Juvenna desenfunda ágilmente una pistola de agujas y coloca el cañón bajo tu barbilla.{/n}

languages.text: “我不信。”{n}尤文娜迅速从枪套中抽出毒针手枪，抵在你的下颌上。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I am not convinced." {n}Juvenna swiftly draws a needle pistol from its holster and presses the barrel under your chin.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我不信。”{n}尤文娜迅速从枪套中抽出毒针手枪，抵在你的下颌上。{/n}

languages.text: « Je ne suis pas convaincue. » {n}D'un geste vif, Juvenna dégaine un pistolet à aiguilles dont elle vous plaque le canon sous le menton.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I am not convinced." {n}Juvenna swiftly draws a needle pistol from its holster and presses the barrel under your chin.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Je ne suis pas convaincue. » {n}D'un geste vif, Juvenna dégaine un pistolet à aiguilles dont elle vous plaque le canon sous le menton.{/n}

languages.text: "İkna olmadım." {n}Juvenna, hızla kılıfından bir iğne tabancası çekiyor ve namlusunu çenene dayıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I am not convinced." {n}Juvenna swiftly draws a needle pistol from its holster and presses the barrel under your chin.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "İkna olmadım." {n}Juvenna, hızla kılıfından bir iğne tabancası çekiyor ve namlusunu çenene dayıyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Das überzeugt mich nicht." {n}Juvenna zieht eine Nadelpistole aus ihrem Halfter und hält dir ihren den Lauf unter das Kinn.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Das überzeugt mich nicht." {n}Juvenna zieht eine Nadelpistole aus ihrem Halfter und hält dir ihren den Lauf unter das Kinn.{/n}

languages.text: 「納得はいかない」{n}ジュベナは素早くホルスターから針銃を取り出し、その銃口をあなたの顎の下に押し付ける.{/n}
